Headline: #52 Kedzie/California Temporary Reroute at Kedzie/59th
ShortDescription: #52 Kedzie/California buses are rrtd via Kedzie, 59th, California, 67th and Kedzie, then will resume their normal route due to street blockage near Kedzie/59th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#52 Kedzie/California buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Kedzie, 59th, California, 67th and Kedzie, then will resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Kedzie/59th.
